# Rosebud Global

> Rosebud Global Ltd is a UK business systems consultancy building custom AI systems that replace founder-dependent operational work. We build and run bespoke systems for SMEs in recruitment, insurance, aesthetics, legal, property, trades, and hospitality.

## About
- [Homepage](https://rosebud.global/): What Rosebud builds and for whom — an overview of the venture studio and consultancy

## Services
- [Recruitment](https://rosebud.global/industries/recruitment): Custom recruitment system for agencies, in-house teams, and executive search
- [Insurance](https://rosebud.global/industries/insurance): Custom insurance system for brokers, agencies, and carriers
- [Healthcare](https://rosebud.global/industries/healthcare): Custom healthcare system for clinics and operators

## Legal
- [Privacy Notice](https://rosebud.global/privacy): Data handling and user rights
- [Terms of Service](https://rosebud.global/terms): Site and service terms

## Contact
- Email: contact@rosebud.global
- Booking: https://cal.eu/rosebudsolutions/30min
- Location: London, United Kingdom

## Key facts
- Legal entity: Rosebud Global Ltd (Company No. 16623472)
- Founded: 2025
- Founders: Anselm Jr. Okojie (CEO), Sajni Okojie (COO)
- Deployment timeline: 5 weeks from deposit to system live
- Pricing: Custom scoped on demo call; starts from £1,750 setup + £500/month
- Target market: Established SMEs with 5–15 person teams
